outputs.project_readiness_digest: Confirmed scoped refs: workflow_status:alpha is ready_with_gap, review_gate:beta has an owner-confirmation blocker, and owner_backlog:gamma requests release scope owner confirmation. Assumption: digest_scope_refs define the reporting boundary. Missing input: owner decision for release scope remains unresolved.
outputs.status_rollup: workflow_status:alpha: ready_with_gap; note says source packet validated and profile calibration pending. workflow_status:delta was provided but is not included in digest_scope_refs, so it is treated as out-of-scope for this digest.
outputs.priority_blockers: Primary blocker: review_gate:beta states boundary review needs owner confirmation. Related readiness gap: profile calibration remains pending for workflow_status:alpha.
outputs.owner_input_queue: High-priority owner ask from owner_backlog:gamma: confirm release scope owner. This owner input is required before the boundary review blocker can be cleared.
outputs.next_action_recommendations: 1. Owner confirms release scope owner for owner_backlog:gamma. 2. Boundary reviewer uses that decision to resolve review_gate:beta. 3. Calibration work proceeds next on owner_decision_packet_v0 as listed in calibration_priority_refs. 4. Keep workflow_status:delta out of this digest unless the digest scope is expanded.
outputs.boundary_review_note: Read-only digest only. It reports bounded fixture refs, excludes out-of-scope workflow_status:delta from readiness claims, does not mutate upstream artifacts, and contains no private project facts or unstated approvals.

provenance: workflow contract title, summary, inputs, outputs, and notes supplied in prompt
step graph supplied in prompt: prepare_digest_binding, inventory_status_and_backlog, compose_digest, write_bundle_and_boundary_review

workflow_status_refs entry for workflow_status:alpha: ready_with_gap; source packet validated; profile calibration pending

Boundary reviewer: after owner confirmation, revisit review_gate:beta and record whether the blocker is cleared.
Calibration coordinator: schedule owner_decision_packet_v0 next, using calibration_priority_refs as the basis.
Digest maintainer: keep this packet as a reporting layer linked to upstream refs, not as replacement source of truth.

No upstream artifacts are mutated or replaced; all cited refs are read-only reporting inputs.
Reporting boundary is digest_scope_refs plus explicitly provided calibration_priority_refs; workflow_status:delta is noted only as out-of-scope.
